segments.text: Praise the Lord! Sing to the Lord a new song, his praise in the assembly of the godly.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let Israel be glad in his Maker; let the children of Zion rejoice in their King.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: in him…: Heb. in his Makers

segments.text: Let them praise his name with dancing, making melody to him with tambourine and lyre.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For the Lord takes pleasure in his people; he adorns the humble with salvation.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let the godly exult in glory; let them sing for joy on their beds.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let the high praises of God be in their throats and two-edged swords in their hands,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: to execute vengeance on the nations and punishments on the peoples,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: to bind their kings with chains and their nobles with fetters of iron,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: to execute on them the judgment written! This is honor for all his godly ones. Praise the Lord!
segments.speaker: Psalmist
